title: Enda Ippadi Lyrics Kootathil Oruthan
stanzas:
odura nariyila
oru nari kullanari
kullanari vandiyila
oru pakkam pinja tyre

pinja tyre otti oattum
thinasari manushan
build up panna onnumila
koottathula oruthan

velichathil thinam thinam
mutti pottu padichaalum
padichatha marandhutu
examil joram varum

adithadi sandiyila
adikkadi mandayila
adipattu midhi pattu
avasara sigichainga

.. marakatta
odanjitta karikatta
rusiyaana raasathikku
nanju pona palaa kotta
facebooku twitter-la
like share pottuvidu
...

irupathi naalu mani neram
enaku illa nalla neram
idhuku enna parigaaram
naan mullodinja
kedigaaram

panamara uchiyila
kosu onnu aadikkinu
achikinnu
katchi katti paadikinnu

poraadi sandhyila
kundhivittu kundhikinu
paaraalu mandrathula
pachamutta vaangi thinnu

roatula pora onaana
lungikulla vuttuputtu
vanna thiraiyila
vandhu voluntary
valipari.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Enda Ippadi?

The song conveys a sense of fun and celebration, reflecting the carefree spirit of youth.

What is the plot context of Kootathil Oruthan?

The movie revolves around the life of an ordinary man and his humorous experiences, with this song highlighting the joyous moments.

Who are the singers of Enda Ippadi?

The song features vocals by Emcee Jazz and the legendary SPB.

Who composed the music for Kootathil Oruthan?

The music for the film was composed by Nivas K Prasanna.

When was Enda Ippadi released?

The song was released on December 2, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Enda Ippadi, the lively beats and playful lyrics encapsulate the carefree essence of youth, making it a perfect anthem for celebrations. The song serves as a backdrop to the protagonist's humorous escapades in Kootathil Oruthan, emphasizing the joy and vibrancy of life. With its upbeat tempo, it evokes feelings of happiness and energy, inviting listeners to dance along. This collaboration between Emcee Jazz and SPB adds a unique flavor, making it a memorable track in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Enda Ippadi from Kootathil Oruthan is a vibrant celebration of life and energy, featuring an electrifying collaboration between the dynamic Emcee Jazz and the legendary SPB. This song perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance with its catchy beats and lively lyrics. Get ready to groove to this infectious track that will surely lift your spirits!
stanzaMeanings: In a crowded place, a dog is barking, and nearby, there's a tire that has been punctured.
With a punctured tire, a person is trying to build something, but nothing is happening in this gathering.
I am walking too, but nothing is happening, why is it like this?
Even with teeth, I can't get a glimpse, why is it like this?
There is no friendship on Facebook, why is it like this?
Even if I hit my head, I can't get up, why is it like this?
Whether it's flying or having a door, whether it's near the lights, nothing good is happening here.
There is no thread, no disguise, just dancing without any reason.
In my life, events like this happen often.
Why is it like this - why is it like this for me?
At this age, I can't find what I like, even if I find it, I can't enjoy it.
Even if I study hard every day, I forget it during exams and face difficulties.
In the evening, during the time of the meeting, I get hit and feel the pressure, and they hurry me up.
There is no money, no class, if I miss class, I miss it, if I go to the market, I get nothing.
I post on Facebook and Twitter about the pain of the Russian zodiac, and I get likes and shares.
Without a group, the comedian will give it away.
I have a destiny that I will face, I will go through it.
At 4:30, I have no good time, what remedy do I have for this? I am stuck in a mess.
Why is it like this when I try to do something wrong?
Even if God blesses, things don't happen, why is it like this?
Why is it like this - why is it like this for me?
In the evening, I hit something and then I see the green leaves in the garden.
In the jungle, I feel hungry and tired, and I am in a mess.
In the road, I am stuck in a lungi, and I come to the screen voluntarily.
My stomach is full, but my life is not good, why is it like this?
I can't find a way in any direction, why is it like this?
Even if I am here, I can't smile, why is it like this?
Nothing is happening, why is it like this?
Whether it's flying or having a door, whether it's near the lights, nothing good is happening here.
There is no thread, no disguise, just dancing without any reason.
In my life, events like this happen often.
Why is it like this - why is it like this for me?
